flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Mid-Del Technology Center rose 72% between 2006 and 2009 (64 → 110).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Mid-Del Technology Center rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (71.4% → 81.0%).
